note: File-transfer-over-MQTT server (MqttFtpService). Subscribes ftp_server/command (JSON), writes/reads files under a mandatory destination folder in CRC32-checked chunks (default 512), publishes ftp_server/reply + ftp_server/file_finished. Broker localhost:1883 keepalive 60 (the literal 5000 is the client +0x58 field, NOT the port). The multiframe reassembly (size limit, open-transfer eviction) is the CAN TP layer (lib/src/tp/tp.c), vendor. Reconstructed to behaviour-oriented C in main/mqtt_ftp/{src,include} (2 TUs, build clean). Decoded + adversarially verified by a 5-cluster workflow; ctor + topics confirmed by direct read_memory.

named_functions.0x00107850: main  // CLI getopt 'vh' (-v/--verbose, -h); positionals <destination-folder> (mandatory) + <chunk-size> (stoul base10, default 0x200=512); usage 'Usage: `<argv0>` [params...] <destination-folder> <chunk-size>'; builds service_env (MQTT localhost:1883) + MqttFtpService, runs, tears down; main.cpp:0x2f WRN 'UpdateService shut down' (copy-paste leftover).
named_functions.0x0010ab50: mqtt_ftp_service_ctor  // MqttFtpService(mqtt, fs::path dest, IClock, chunk_size): stores mqtt@+0x08, dest_folder@+0x30, clock@+0x58, chunk_size@+0x60, an fstream member @+0x68..; mqtt_ftp_service.cpp:0x10 WRN 'Starting MQTTFTPServer'; subscribes ftp_server/command (DAT_0012f028) -> handler FUN_0010a920, qos 1.
named_functions.0x0010a920: mqtt_ftp_on_command  // ftp_server/command handler: parse JSON; a 'data' payload (or flush) -> write (CRC32 per-block vs cmd 'crc', append under dest/<name>, truncate on index==0, flush -> file_finished), else -> read (seek index*chunk_size, CRC32, reply with 'data'). 'silent' suppresses the reply. Error token FTP_ERR_FILE_ACCESS.

json_schema.command: name, index, crc, data (write), silent, flush, chunk_size
json_schema.reply: status ('OK'|FTP_ERR_FILE_ACCESS), name, size, index, crc, cached (+ data on reads)

vendor_deferred: common::MQTTClient/CRC32/IClock, ServiceEnv, the CAN transport-protocol multiframe assembler (lib/src/tp/tp.c: 'Multiframe transfer too large', 'Too many open multiframe write transfers'), std::filesystem/fstream, nlohmann-json, libstdc++/libc.
